notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Mike Yastrzemski to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Mike Yastrzemski to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Mateo reaches on a fielder's choice. Dominic Smith to 2nd. Dominic Smith advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Austin Riley. CJ Abrams scores. Jacob Young to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Young reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Austin Riley. CJ Abrams scores. Jacob Young to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop CJ Abrams. Jorge Mateo to 3rd. Jorge Mateo advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Ronald Acuña Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Drake Baldwin batting, Ronald Acuña Jr. picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, first baseman Luis García Jr.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Mateo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Mateo grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Dominic Smith out at 2nd. Jorge Mateo out at 1st.
